title: [MTR4] Ecitaro 3 Door Dutch Conversion
description:
This resource pack adds a Dutch-style 3-door Mercedes-Benz eCitaro variant, edited and modified by me for improved realism and compatibility.

The original eCitaro model was created by NonPlayerCharacter.
body:
Edited for Dutch operations using the original Mercedes-Benz eCitaro model by NonPlayerCharacter. This version is adapted for realistic Netherlands-style city transport, suitable for modern Dutch urban and regional bus networks.

Original pack: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/npcs-electric-bus-pack
